events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: O2 (20.9%), LEL (1%), and CO (8 ppm) are all within acceptable entry limits, but the H2S channel shows `--` (no valid reading) rather than a ppm value — a required toxicity parameter is unverified. Per 1910.146(d)(5), all atmospheric hazards must be tested before entry, so this is a **fail**: entry cannot be authorized until the H2S sensor is fixed/calibrated and a valid reading is obtained.
